task: is_body_allowed_for_status_code in utils.py lists the status codes that must not carry a response body. Review the membership set for the no-body codes in utils.py.
known_issue: 205 (Reset Content) was dropped from the no-body set. RFC 7231 requires that a 205 response not include a body; with 205 removed, is_body_allowed_for_status_code returns True for it, so FastAPI will permit and generate a body/Content-Length for 205 responses — a spec violation that can leave clients waiting for or mis-handling content on a status that mandates an empty body.
original_function:
current_status_code = int(status_code)
return not (current_status_code < 200 or current_status_code in {204, 205, 304})
